The '''''Roaming Ronto''''' was a [[Gallofree Yards, Inc./Legends|Gallofree Yards, Inc.]], [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transport]] owned by [[Bornaryn Trading]] which was used to transport at least a dozen [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries to the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1st}}
